WhenCompleteSymmetric.message:
WhenCompleteSymmetric violation: processed = M =>
        \A i \in 1..M : task_acq[i] = 1 /\ task_rel[i] = 1

AllInvariants.message:
AllInvariants violation: /\ ConcurrencyBound

    /\ SemaphoreConservation
    /\ PerTaskAtMostOnce
    /\ AcqBeforeRel
 ...

assert_ConcurrencyBound.description: Test assertion for ConcurrencyBound from SweepRemainingAsync spec

assert_SemNonNegative.description: Test assertion for SemNonNegative from SweepRemainingAsync spec

assert_SemaphoreConservation.message: Assertion failed: SemaphoreConservation — sem + active = N
assert_SemaphoreConservation.description: Test assertion for SemaphoreConservation from SweepRemainingAsync spec

assert_PerTaskAtMostOnce.message: Assertion failed: PerTaskAtMostOnce — \A i \in 1..M : task_acq[i] <= 1 /\ task_rel[i] <= 1
assert_PerTaskAtMostOnce.description: Test assertion for PerTaskAtMostOnce from SweepRemainingAsync spec

assert_AcqBeforeRel.message: Assertion failed: AcqBeforeRel — \A i \in 1..M : task_rel[i] <= task_acq[i]
assert_AcqBeforeRel.description: Test assertion for AcqBeforeRel from SweepRemainingAsync spec

assert_WhenCompleteSymmetric.condition:
processed = M implies
        \A i in 1..M : task_acq[i] = 1 and task_rel[i] = 1
assert_WhenCompleteSymmetric.message:
Assertion failed: WhenCompleteSymmetric — processed = M =>
        \A i \in 1..M : task_acq[i] = 1 /\ task_rel[i] = 1
assert_WhenCompleteSymmetric.description: Test assertion for WhenCompleteSymmetric from SweepRemainingAsync spec

assert_AllInvariants.condition:
and ConcurrencyBound
    and SemNonNegative
    and SemaphoreConservation
    and PerTaskAtMostOnce
    and AcqBeforeRel
    and WhenCompleteSymmetric
assert_AllInvariants.message:
Assertion failed: AllInvariants — /\ ConcurrencyBound
    /\ SemNonNegative
    /\ SemaphoreConservation
    /\ PerTaskAtMostOnce
    /\ AcqBeforeRel
 ...
